arts.ttl: Lazio vs. Napoli: a big clash awaits
arts.sum: Despite Lazio occupying one of the top four positions in the Serie A table after 24 games played for the first time since 2019/20, the Biancocelesti have won only one of their last five home league games (D2 L2), winning the most recent one against Monza. Giovanni Simeone is the current Serie A player who has scored the most goals against Lazio in the league: eight (including four in a single match, Hellas Verona’s 4-1 win on 24 October 2021) in 15 matches; however, over the last two seasons, he has scored just two goals, with his most recent away goal in the competition coming in October 2022, against Cremonese.

arts.ttl: Lazio vs Napoli | Serie A | Team News & Probable Lineups
arts.sum: Lazio will host league leaders Napoli at the Stadio Olimpico in Rome for the biggest tilt of Serie A Matchday 25. The contest kicks off on Saturday, 18:00 local time. arts.ttl: Napoli Set Sights on Udinese Center-Back to Strengthen Backline
arts.sum: Serie A title hopefuls Napoli have reportedly identified Udinese center-back Oumas Solet as a concrete defensive target for the summer. According to Calciomercato, the 25-year-old has emerged as a viable alternative for Fiorentina's Pietro Comuzzo. arts.ttl: This Week In Lazio History: February 10-16
arts.sum: This week in Lazio history we witnessed some big wins, particularly the thrashing of Milan in the Coppa Italia semifinal. We also remember Francesco Gabriotti.
